rulings.Case Title: E. DAYAN SANDLER VS. MARCY GRUNEHUT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 22, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT MARCH GRUENHUT DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained for Plaintiff to allege facts explaining in good faith the discrepancy between the Premises description in paragraph 1 of the Complaint and the Lease. Plaintiff is also to attach a legible copy of the Lease. If Plaintiff is not able to produce a legible copy of the lease, Plaintiff to allege verbatim those portions of the scanned document that are not legible. (e.g. typed text in the paragraph immediately before the paragraph titled "Multiple Occupancy" is not legible in the copy of the Lease provided to the Court, etc.). Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/CFH)
